subtitle: Manage loyalty seasons and rewards
seasonEnded: Season ended. {{users}} users processed, {{points}} bonus points awarded.
confirmEndSeason: Are you sure you want to end this season? This will award tier bonuses to all eligible users and cannot be undone.
rewardValidation: Reward name and positive points cost are required
pointAdjustmentsInfo: Use this tool to manually add or deduct loyalty points for users. Always provide a clear note explaining the reason for the adjustment.
noteRequired: Note is required for audit purposes
userIdHelp: The numeric ID of the user to adjust points for
searchUserPlaceholder: Search by name, email, phone, or ID...
searchUserHelp: Search and select the user to adjust points for
pointsAmountHelp: Enter the number of points to add or deduct
noteHelp: Explain the reason for this adjustment (required for audit trail)
notePlaceholder: e.g., Compensation for issue #123, Promotional bonus, etc.
seasonInfo: If you activate immediately, the season will start accepting transactions right away. Otherwise it starts on the specified start date.
maxRedemptionsHelp: Leave empty for unlimited redemptions per user
blockUnblockUserSubtitle: Restrict or restore a user's loyalty account access
blockUserInfo: Blocking a user prevents them from earning or spending loyalty points. View balance and history will still work.
unblockUserInfo: Unblocking will restore the user's ability to earn and spend loyalty points.
blockUntilHelp: Leave empty for a permanent block. Auto-unblocked after this date.
userBlocked: User has been blocked from the loyalty system
providerBlocked: Provider has been blocked from the loyalty system
providerUnblocked: Provider has been unblocked from the loyalty system
unblockProviderConfirm: This will restore the provider's ability to create new loyalty transactions.
